title: A system and method for integrated digital business solution
abstract: The present invention relates to a system (100) for providing integrated digital business solution. The system (100) includes a machine readable storage medium (102),a processor (104), a system interface (106), and a cloud server (108). The machine readable storage medium (102) stores instructions. The processor (104) executes instructions stored in the machine readable storage medium (102) to implement a method. The method is executed by the system interface (106). The system interface (106) is connected to a cloud server 108). The system interface(106) helps interaction between Buyer and Seller and execute the method that includes a plurality of processes. The processes includes a process of registration and authentication, hosting Sellerâs products, setting up Seller store, conducting search, order management, payment management, dispute management, feedback, interaction, referral. The present invention reduces the cost of operation as well as the need of human interaction thereby reducing the time of tackling the threat.
claims:
Claims CLAIM 1. A system(lOO) for providing integrated digital business solution, the system(lOO) comprising: a machine readable storage medium(102); the machine readable storage medium(102) stores instructions; a processor(104), the processor(104) executes instructions stored in the machine readable storage medium(102) to implement a method; a system interface(106), wherein the method is executed by the system interface(106); and a cloud server(108), wherein the system interface(106) is connected to a cloud server(108). 2. The method as claimed in claim 1, the method comprising: a plurality of Buyers; a plurality of Sellers; a plurality of customer support executives; and a plurality of processes, the processes having a process of registration and authentication, a process of hosting Sellerâs products, a process of setting up Seller store, a process of conducting search, a process of order management, a process of payment management, a process of dispute management, a process of feedback, a process of interaction, a process of referral. 3. The process of registration and authentication as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of Seller registration, wherein the method having checking if incoming Seller is already registered, redirecting the registered Seller to system interface(108), redirecting the new Seller to registration module, the new Seller inputs personal information in the registration interface, a verification through electronic means is performed, the new Seller input business details, the business details input by new Seller are verified by the customer support executive, the new Seller enters bank and store details, after verification the new Seller becomes registered Seller; and a method of Buyer registration, wherein the method having checking if incoming Buyer is already registered, redirecting the registered Buyer to existing Buyer interface, redirecting the new Buyer to registration module, the new Buyer selects the type of market, the new Buyer inputs business details, the new Buyer inputs personal details, a verification through electronic means is performed, the new Buyer input business details, 

 the business details input by the new Buyer are verified by the customer support executive, the new Buyer enters bank and address details, after verification the new Buyer becomes registered Buyer. 4. A process of hosting Sellerâs products as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of hosting registered Seller products on the cloud server(108), wherein the method having the registered Seller inputs products on the product hosting interface; and a method of hosting registered Seller products via his domain name, wherein the method having redirecting the registered Seller to customer support for assistance in domain setup. 5. A process of setting up Seller store as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of store setup, the method having registered Seller input option in system interface(108), taking input of registered Seller to select plan for store, taking input from registered Seller to select theme for store, taking of input product, supply, tax, shipping price, product image details from the registered Seller; and a method of registered Seller admin panel and settings, the method having Seller to accept all terms and condition, print the Seller specific terms and conditions and send to system interface(108), system interface(108) to acknowledge receipt through registered mail id, 

 Seller to visit his admin panel and modify where necessary. 6. A process of setting of conducting search as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of registered Buyer conducting search for registered Seller products in searching interface, the method having registered Buyer views list of product from different registered Sellers, registered Buyer views particular product of interest from at least one registered Sellers, registered Buyer selects a product from a particular registered Seller store, registered Buyer proceeds to buy now and adds the product to the cart, final product list is proceeded to payment; and a method of registered Buyer conducting search for registered Seller products in searching interface, the method having registered Buyer views list of different registered Sellers, registered Buyer view products of interest from registered Seller of interest, registered Buyer selects an at least one product, registered Buyer proceeds to buy now and adds the product to the cart, final product list is proceeded to payment. 7. A process of setting of order management as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of order formation and finalisation, wherein the method having Buyer sends preliminary order to registered Seller and opens a chat on system interface(108), registered Seller receives notification of an order and a chat from that specific Buyer, registered Buyer sends order to registered Seller and awaits response, 

 registered Seller sends order to registered Buyer awaits registered Buyerâs confirmation, registered Buyer sends registered Seller with some term awaits registered Sellers response, registered Seller responds to registered Buyer awaits his confirmation, and registered Buyer requests proforma from registered Seller; a method of inspection for goods-services on receipt, the method having registered Buyer inspect items during inspection period to confirm either acceptance of goods-services or raise dispute; a method of amendment of order and finalization, the method having cloning of an order to amend dispatch schedules for multiple quantities, for multiple dispatch dates; a method of order confirmation and acceptance, the method having detailed interactions with a Seller on product specifications, volumes, prices, term & conditions, dispatch schedules, the Buyer confirms the order on the system interface(108), and receipt of order from Buyer to be as mutually discussed on the system interface(108), Seller communicates acceptance of the order to the Buyer, on client Sellerâs acceptance, Buyer may request proforma invoice from the Seller; a method of proforma generation on system interface(108), the method having proforma sent from registered Seller to registered Buyer, registered Buyer requests changes product specifications, quantities, dispatch schedules, logistics, registered Seller responds as required, if both parties agree, registered Seller sends revised proforma, and registered Buyer accepts revised proforma and proceeds for payment; 

 A method of order execution and dispatch of goods-services, the method having registered Buyer and registered Seller confirm goods-services availability as per terms of confirmed, registered Buyer and registered Seller exchange details of stock availability, advance booking; and a method of order execution and documentation material, documentation and information flow, the method having registered Seller exchange details of goods-services dispatch, shipment progress, inspection status with registered Buyer through system interface(106) via cloud server(108). 8. A process of setting of payment management as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of exchange of proforma and payment, the method having on receipt of order acceptance, registered Buyer requests proforma invoice from registered Seller, registered Seller generates profoma invoice on the system interface(108), registered Buyer proceeds to make payment on receipt of proforma invoice, registered Buyer makes payment through electronic or physical means, and the system interface(108) escrow type account with bank; a method of goods-services acceptance and payment release by Buyer, the method having registered Buyer receives goods-services and confirms to the registered Seller on the registered Seller database, registered Buyer undertakes inspection of goods-services received and interacts with Registered Seller for any assistance required for completing inspection, and registered Buyer accepts goods-services received, the release of payment for the transaction is done on system interface(108); and 

 a method of document payment and information flow, the method having proforma invoice is sent by registered Seller to registered Buyer through electronic means, and registered Buyer and registered Seller interact with system interface(108) information flow regarding payment receipt at bank through system interface(108); a method of material receipt, registered Buyer confirmation and payment release normal successful transaction, the method having registered Seller executes contract with documents, registered Buyer confirms receipt of material, acceptance of material received as per order, within a specified period from date of receipt, to the system interface(108), registered Buyer confirms release of payment on the system interface(108), system interface(108) advises bank to release payment bank release payment to client; and a method of payment settlement normal, successful transaction, the method having registered Seller executes contract/ order as agreed, registered Buyer confirms receipt of materials as per contract/order to the system interface/ 108), payment flow moves in the direction from bank escrow type account to system interface/ 108) transition host account. 9. A process of setting of interaction as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of price quote submission, the method having a Buyer needs a quote for a typical product, clickâask for quoteâ and provide and submit details of requirement, incase Buyer registered on system interface/ 108) login, 

 incase the Buyer is not registered on system interface(108) register and authenticate, Seller can clickâsubmit quoteâ and check for requirement to quote, Seller finds one or more requirements that can be fulfilled and provide quotes as required, incase the Seller is existing Seller login, incase the Seller is new, Seller register and authenticate Seller on system interface(108), and upload product related information and confirm submission of quotes; a method of help desk process, the method having the help desk interface follows the role of ticket management, response management, lead conversion, social media support and knowledge base article; a method of social media management, the method having the social media interface follows the role of social media publishing, real time monitoring, social media analysis; and a method of insurance, packaging and logistics terms and condition on system interface(108), the method having registered client and Buyer can interact with each other about packaging, insurance and logistics; a method of pre order interaction on system interface(108), the method having registered Buyer wants to chat with registered Seller clicks chat now button on system interface(108), pre order chat opens with that particular client, and registered Buyer and registered Seller are now known to each other; a method of order placement interaction on system interface(108), the method having 

 enquiry specification and products features, availability, price, applicable taxes, packing and dispatch logistics dispatch instructions, and special instruction and order intent; a method of products variants enquiry on system interface(108), the method having typical interaction between prospective registered Buyer and registered Seller; a method of request for samples and samples approval on system interface(108), the method having registered Buyer requests for samples, registered Seller interacts with register Buyer and tells specification of product; and a method of request for product availability and dispatch schedule on system interface(108), the method having registered Buyer requests the availability of product, registered Seller tells about product availability and specification of product. 10. A process of dispute management as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of dispatch date amendment, the method having registered Seller raise request for dispatch date amendment, incase of denial for amendment by registered Buyer, registered Seller and registered Buyer renegotiate, incase of negative conclusion, registered Buyer raise dispute, incase of approval of amendment date, and registered Seller dispatch goods-services; 

 a method of non-dispatch of goods-services and services, the method having registered Buyer raises a dispute if registered Seller does not dispatch goods- services and services, registered Buyer provides evidence of dispute, registered Buyer is fully refunded incase of dispute confirmation; and a method of non-satisfactory goods-services and services, the method having registered Buyer raises a dispute if registered Seller dispatch faulty goods- services and services, registered Buyer provides evidence of dispute, registered Buyer is fully or partially refunded incase of dispute confirmation. 11. A process of setting of feedback as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of providing feedback for registered Seller, the method having a mechanism of providing feedback on Seller service parameters; a method of providing feedback for registered Buyer, the method having a mechanism of providing feedback on Buyer service parameters; and a method of providing feedback for system interface(108), the method having a mechanism of providing feedback on system services parameters; 12. A process of referral as claimed in claim 2, the process comprising: a method of referral partner system on system interface(108), the method having client registers on system interface(108) as Buyers and Sellers, get unique referral partner code, 

 person registering only as referrals partner to submit their contact details and bank details on registered interface, client registered as Seller or Buyer or those registered referral partners, provide their referral partner code, facilitate prospective new clients to register on registered interface as Seller or Buyer, these new client registered on registered interface on such referral get a unique Seller id and Buyer id and their own referral partner code, for every transition made by new client the old client who referred them gets suitably rewarded, and the reward is credited to the referral partners bank account.
